subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God who art attracted to Him! Jinab-i-Amin is present, and this servant of Baha doth remind thee that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المنجذبه جناب امین حاضر و این عبد بها را اخطار مینماید که امه
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity
